clause_text:
Payment Terms. Buyer shall pay all undisputed invoices within 90 days of receipt of a correct invoice referencing a valid purchase order number. An early-payment discount of 1.5% applies to undisputed invoices paid within ten (10) days. Invoices lacking a purchase order reference may be returned unpaid.

Performance Standards. Supplier commits to 97% on-time, in-full delivery and a maximum defect rate of 500 PPM. Supplier shall report performance monthly. Missed targets in any quarter trigger a quality review and, at Buyer's option, a 3% credit against invoices for the affected lines.

Termination. Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon 90 days' prior written notice. Buyer may terminate for cause immediately upon Supplier's material breach remaining uncured for fifteen (15) days after notice, insolvency, or violation of Buyer's Supplier Code of Conduct. Open purchase orders accepted before the effective date of termination remain binding.

Limitation of Liability. Except for liability arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, infringement, or breach of confidentiality, each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed 200% of the fees paid or payable in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim. Neither party is liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
title: Master Supply Agreement — Harbor Fabrication AB

clause_text:
Payment. Net 45 days from receipt of a conforming invoice. Buyer may set off amounts owed by Supplier against amounts payable hereunder. A prompt-payment discount of 1.5% is available for payment within ten (10) days of invoice.

Performance Standards. Supplier commits to 95% on-time, in-full delivery and a maximum defect rate of 1000 PPM. Supplier shall report performance monthly. Missed targets in any quarter trigger a quality review and, at Buyer's option, a 3% credit against invoices for the affected lines.

Term and Termination. This Agreement may be terminated by either party on 90 days' written notice. Termination does not affect accrued rights. Upon termination, Supplier shall deliver all Buyer-owned tooling, specifications, and work in progress against payment of amounts properly due.
title: Framework Purchase Agreement — Calder Precision GmbH

clause_text:
Invoicing and Payment. Supplier shall invoice upon shipment and Buyer shall remit payment within 45 days of invoice receipt. Disputed amounts may be withheld pending resolution; the undisputed balance remains payable when due. Late payments accrue interest at one percent (1%) per month or the maximum lawful rate, if lower.

Service Levels. Supplier shall maintain an on-time delivery rate of at least 95% measured monthly and a quality level not exceeding 500 defective parts per million. Sustained failure for two consecutive months entitles Buyer to a service credit of 2% of the affected period's spend and a corrective action plan within ten (10) business days.

Term and Termination. This Agreement may be terminated by either party on 30 days' written notice. Termination does not affect accrued rights. Upon termination, Supplier shall deliver all Buyer-owned tooling, specifications, and work in progress against payment of amounts properly due.

Late payments accrue interest at one percent (1%) per month or the maximum lawful rate, if lower.

Service Levels. Supplier shall maintain an on-time delivery rate of at least 98% measured monthly and a quality level not exceeding 1000 defective parts per million. Sustained failure for two consecutive months entitles Buyer to a service credit of 3% of the affected period's spend and a corrective action plan within ten (10) business days.

Term and Termination. This Agreement may be terminated by either party on 60 days' written notice. Termination does not affect accrued rights. Upon termination, Supplier shall deliver all Buyer-owned tooling, specifications, and work in progress against payment of amounts properly due.

Limitation of Liability. Except for liability arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, infringement, or breach of confidentiality, each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed 100% of the fees paid or payable in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim. Neither party is liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
title: Framework Purchase Agreement — Pinnacle Forge S.A. de C.V.

clause_text:
Payment Terms. Buyer shall pay all undisputed invoices within 60 days of receipt of a correct invoice referencing a valid purchase order number. An early-payment discount of 1.5% applies to undisputed invoices paid within ten (10) days. Invoices lacking a purchase order reference may be returned unpaid.

Term and Termination. This Agreement may be terminated by either party on 60 days' written notice. Termination does not affect accrued rights. Upon termination, Supplier shall deliver all Buyer-owned tooling, specifications, and work in progress against payment of amounts properly due.

title: Category Supply Agreement — Apex Dynamics Components Sdn Bhd

clause_text:
Invoicing and Payment. Supplier shall invoice upon shipment and Buyer shall remit payment within 90 days of invoice receipt. Disputed amounts may be withheld pending resolution; the undisputed balance remains payable when due. Late payments accrue interest at one percent (1%) per month or the maximum lawful rate, if lower.

Service Levels. Supplier shall maintain an on-time delivery rate of at least 97% measured monthly and a quality level not exceeding 250 defective parts per million. Sustained failure for two consecutive months entitles Buyer to a service credit of 2% of the affected period's spend and a corrective action plan within ten (10) business days.

Termination. Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon 60 days' prior written notice. Buyer may terminate for cause immediately upon Supplier's material breach remaining uncured for fifteen (15) days after notice, insolvency, or violation of Buyer's Supplier Code of Conduct. Open purchase orders accepted before the effective date of termination remain binding.

Liability. Each party's total cumulative liability is capped at 100% of amounts paid under this Agreement in the preceding twelve (12) months, except that no cap applies to bodily injury, fraud, or willful misconduct. Supplier shall maintain commercial general liability insurance adequate to its obligations.
title: Master Supply Agreement — Aurora Materials B.V.

clause_text:

Disputed amounts may be withheld pending resolution; the undisputed balance remains payable when due. Late payments accrue interest at one percent (1%) per month or the maximum lawful rate, if lower.

Performance Standards. Supplier commits to 95% on-time, in-full delivery and a maximum defect rate of 1000 PPM. Supplier shall report performance monthly. Missed targets in any quarter trigger a quality review and, at Buyer's option, a 5% credit against invoices for the affected lines.

Termination. Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon 90 days' prior written notice. Buyer may terminate for cause immediately upon Supplier's material breach remaining uncured for fifteen (15) days after notice, insolvency, or violation of Buyer's Supplier Code of Conduct. Liability. Supplier shall maintain commercial general liability insurance adequate to its obligations.

Neither party is liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
title: Master Supply Agreement — Cascade Forge SAS

clause_text:
Payment. Net 45 days from receipt of a conforming invoice. Buyer may set off amounts owed by Supplier against amounts payable hereunder. A prompt-payment discount of 1.5% is available for payment within ten (10) days of invoice.

Performance Standards. Supplier commits to 95% on-time, in-full delivery and a maximum defect rate of 1000 PPM. Supplier shall report performance monthly. Missed targets in any quarter trigger a quality review and, at Buyer's option, a 2% credit against invoices for the affected lines.

Liability. Each party's total cumulative liability is capped at 150% of amounts paid under this Agreement in the preceding twelve (12) months, except that no cap applies to bodily injury, fraud, or willful misconduct. Supplier shall maintain commercial general liability insurance adequate to its obligations.

Term and Termination. This Agreement may be terminated by either party on 60 days' written notice. Termination does not affect accrued rights. Upon termination, Supplier shall deliver all Buyer-owned tooling, specifications, and work in progress against payment of amounts properly due.

title: Master Supply Agreement — Granite Metals s.r.o.

clause_text:
Invoicing and Payment. Supplier shall invoice upon shipment and Buyer shall remit payment within 30 days of invoice receipt. Disputed amounts may be withheld pending resolution; the undisputed balance remains payable when due. Late payments accrue interest at one percent (1%) per month or the maximum lawful rate, if lower.

Service Levels. Supplier shall maintain an on-time delivery rate of at least 95% measured monthly and a quality level not exceeding 1000 defective parts per million. Sustained failure for two consecutive months entitles Buyer to a service credit of 3% of the affected period's spend and a corrective action plan within ten (10) business days.

Termination. Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon 60 days' prior written notice. Buyer may terminate for cause immediately upon Supplier's material breach remaining uncured for fifteen (15) days after notice, insolvency, or violation of Buyer's Supplier Code of Conduct. Open purchase orders accepted before the effective date of termination remain binding.

Liability. Each party's total cumulative liability is capped at 100% of amounts paid under this Agreement in the preceding twelve (12) months, except that no cap applies to bodily injury, fraud, or willful misconduct. Supplier shall maintain commercial general liability insurance adequate to its obligations.
